name: python3-msoffcrypto-tool
title: python3-msoffcrypto-tool
summary: Python tool and library for decrypting MS Office files
description:
Python tool and library for decrypting MS Office files
msoffcrypto-tool (formerly ms-offcrypto-tool) is a Python tool and library
for decrypting encrypted MS Office files with password, intermediate key,
or private key which generated its escrow key.

arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for msoffcrypto-tool.
arguments.raw: -tool  Option present in package usage line for msoffcrypto-tool.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use msoffcrypto-tool because Python tool and library for decrypting MS Office files.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use msoffcrypto-tool as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `msoffcrypto-tool [options] [args]` as documented upstream for msoffcrypto-tool.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair msoffcrypto-tool with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `msoffcrypto-tool --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

arguments.name: -tool
arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for msoffcrypto-tool.
